description_long: This is a vintage coupe car with a highly ornate and classic design, reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles. The body is predominantly black with gold trim and red accents, including the spoked wheels and interior seating. The car features a long hood with brass fixtures, a prominent front grille, and a pair of large, round headlamps. The open-top design reveals a detailed dashboard with a wooden steering wheel and brass controls, while the rear includes a wicker trunk and a visible license plate. The fenders are curved and pronounced, and the side exhaust pipes add to the period-specific aesthetic. The overall craftsmanship and decorative elements suggest a luxurious, collectible vehicle, likely inspired by famous movie or show cars.
description: A luxurious, vintage black coupe car with gold trim, red wheels, and an open-top design featuring ornate brass and wooden details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wicker trunk, red interior, and license plate, with the dashboard and steering wheel visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the long hood, gold trim, red spoked wheels, and side exhaust pipes.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the ornate grille, brass headlamps, and detailed hood with gold accents.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with clear visibility of the open-top seating and rear trunk.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
